description: Two drafts of a deed of gift. Location: Fustat. Dated: Sunday, 9 Nisan 1352 Seleucid = 15 March 1041 CE. In which Naḥum b. Faraḥ gives to his sister Munā and Sittūna (though in the second part of the second draft he gives to Sittūna only) a house in the al-Mashshāṭ street of the al-Jaʿfariyya quarter in Ṣahrajt in Lower Egypt, worth 10 dinars. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בCAJS.
